response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of polyglot software engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, plus strong TypeScript/Node.js background. However, the resume shows minimal evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI systems, no explicit RAG/vector database work, no major cloud platform depth (AWS mentioned only briefly via CDK), and no customer-facing technical discovery leadership typical of a Staff Forward Deployed role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js depth
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring
concerns: Lacks 8+ years of production GenAI/AI-solution delivery experience
No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation pipeline experience listed
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing forward-deployed consulting work

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG and vector DB experience
